steps.title: Identify the logical movement
steps.content: The underlined sentence uses Because to move from a specific finding (wood from distant Jura) to a broader claim about Roman trade complexity. This is the payoff moment where evidence yields a larger insight.

steps.title: Determine the function
steps.content: The sentence presents a conclusion about Roman trade routes based on the team's findings. B invents a question never asked, C addresses a material choice unmentioned, and D describes construction techniques absent from the text. This matches choice A — A is correct.
